title: Jesse Clegg to perform live in Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Garden Route favourite and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Garden Route favourite and national superstar Jesse Clegg will be performing live at Blend Country Restaurant.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Garden Route favourite and national superstar Jesse Clegg will be performing live at Blend Country Restaurant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gates will open at 15:30 and the event will take place at 17:00.","html":"Gates will open at 15:30 and the event will take place at 17:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event promises to be a fun treat for music lovers and entertainment for the entire family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The performance forms part of Clegg’s current Coast to Coast tour. Tickets are available to purchase on Ticketpro.","html":"The performance forms part of Clegg’s current Coast to Coast tour. Tickets are available to purchase on Ticketpro."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Jesse Clegg to perform live in Knysna
